top_signals.title: Bitcoin tops $67K following US-Iran peace deal: Is it a bull trap?
top_signals.summary: Despite Bitcoin derivatives data highlight traders’ skepticism even though BTC briefly rallied above $67,000. Are bulls stepping into a trap?
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic's Fable shutdown is a big moment for open-source AI
top_signals.summary: Anthropic’s Fable shutdown could boost open-source AI, but many of the models gaining traction are Chinese.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
